title: IDEAS dump May 2023 — pre-Brotein product brainstorm
html:
IDEAS dump May 2023 — pre-Brotein product brainstorm

Source: 2023-05-13 Apple Note. 15-item product-idea dump — the precursor to the 2024 12 IDEAS note. Pre-Brotein, pre-Rankett.

TL;DR

  • AI ideas surfaced 1 year before they're "obvious": AI girlfriends, AI agency, GPT-builder wrapper apps ("big time fleece and the noobs unfortunately wouldn't know"), AR for concerts, AI Aura ring for Costco.
  • Real-world-asset tokenization — "TOKENIZATION OF REAL WRLD ASSETS" — first capture, predates the wrld brand suffix crystallization by ~1 year.
  • Recurring obsession: dream-recording app appears here AND in Ahmad Jamal stream AND 2024 12 IDEAS = ≥3 mentions across summaries; promote dream app to real concept.
  • Sports/animal markets: model that predicts baby race-horse success rate, horse semen breeding marketplace — first capture of the horse-rights/horse-SaaS thread that recurs in 2024 IDEAS.
  • Health/utility: pickleball injury prevention, police scanner app, smart-home automation, pay-per-article (1-click) — diverse-domain product surface, no commitment yet.
  • Anti-pattern label: "USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION — big time fleece and the noobs wouldn't know" — Yahir self-aware that these are exit-via-naive-customer plays. He doesn't actually pursue.

Connections

  • dream app — promotion candidate (≥3 mentions across summaries now)
  • 2024 12 28 ideas dump — sequel
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — earlier seed
  • wrld brand suffix
  • ai search optimization
  • brotein
  • rankett
